body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fda23/2a380d31/16438799/fc9403/4121053723/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fda23/2a380d31/16438799/fc9403/4121053723/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
I wanted to make sure you saw the news from over the weekend. After weighing the political math, Kelly Ayotte, who stood with Trump for months despite his anti-woman comments and actions, has now determined that voting for Trump would sink her chances in November and gave a self-preserving statement that she will write in someone else on Election Day.
This is cowardly, calculating, and far too little, far too late, and it's up to us to make sure someone as spineless as Ayotte NEVER makes it back to Congress.

name: Michelle Kleppe, HillaryClinton.com
subject: We need all hands on deck -- commit to Get Out the Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Derek --

In just 26 days, we’re going to know who our next president will be. If you are absolutely determined to see Hillary defeat Donald Trump once and for all, we have to be ready to turn out every last voter during our final, nationwide Get Out the Vote (GOTV) push over the last four days of the election. Everything we’ve built together for 18 months will come down to this!

If you’re fired up and ready to sign up for one (or three!) GOTV shifts in your neighborhood from Saturday, November 5th, to Tuesday, November 8th (aka Election Day!), **[don’t wait another second!](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=2&rj=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&rt=0)** We need every pair of hands on deck for this TRULY final fight for votes.

You have been among Hillary’s best supporters throughout this campaign, and YOU are who we are counting on to get out there and hustle in the last four days.

But if you’re still a little unsure about what one of these shifts is all about, let me assure you: It will be easy, exciting, and an experience you’ll never forget -- you’ll literally be making history!

First, we need our best team members to make calls to voters. These calls are simple, quick, and absolutely critical to winning the election because you’ll be telling folks when they can vote, what they need to bring to their polling place, and any other key details to make sure they’ll cast their ballot. (Don’t worry -- we have all this information ready for you!)

The other activity that is essential to GOTV is canvassing your neighborhood and knocking on doors. This one is really fun -- talking to voters face-to-face is the single best tool we have for committing concrete support for Hillary. And nothing feels better than spending a few minutes with a voter and hearing them tell you how eager they are to vote for Hillary.

So let’s get you signed up, Derek! You’re going to be at the heart of THE team that is going to win this election. **Make a promise to sign up for your GOTV shifts today, and we’ll keep you in the loop as we get closer and closer to the final sprint:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=2&rj=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&rt=0)
Thanks,

Michelle

Michelle Kleppe
National Organizing Director
Hillary for America

|
**Can't donate your time? Chip in $1 now to help support our ground team recruit and train more volunteers:**
| [
](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY3NzI1NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYyNzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Does this headline make you angry?
body:
Peter,

Take a look at the headline below. Are you as bothered about it
as I am?

FOX NEWS INSIDER| WikiLeaks Dump: Top Clinton Aides Mock
Catholicism, Evangelical Christianity

It's normal to be angry about this. But our job is not to get
angry. Our job is to get motived.

It's clear that there are some who do not believe that your faith
matters - but both you and I know that it does.

Your faith matters and it can make a bigger difference than you
may think.

I've written to you about this before, but do you remember
Brexit?

The lesson from that historic campaign is that in a democracy,
the people have a unique ability to force change when their
values are being mocked and trampled upon by the elites.

It's called the right to vote.

Just as the people of Britain forced real change, we too have
that power.

Christians in America can fundamentally change the direction of
our nation for years to come. If we merely make our voices heard
at the ballot box, we can restore respect for our values.

That is the sole mission of My Faith Votes. I ask you to stand
with them, and stand up for your faith by making a secure,
tax-deductible donation now.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=92&

It's hard to believe, but November 8 is right around the corner.
Every single day and every single dollar matters, because the
window of opportunity to have an impact is rapidly closing.

Let's not allow our voices to go unheard. Don't get angry. Get
motivated.

Thank you for your commitment.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

When Nate Silver's team ran the numbers showing what would happen if only men voted, Donald Trump won in a landslide.

So what did a bunch of Trump’s supporters do when they saw this? They took to social media in droves to call for a repeal of the 19th Amendment. That's the one that gave women the right to vote, folks!

body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d88/4082994173/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- As I travel between our 20(!) Indiana field offices, I'm incredibly proud of how hard our staff and volunteers are working to elect Evan.

But everywhere I go, I'm told that they want to be doing _more_. More phone calls. More canvassing. More early voting. More talking to undecided Hoosiers.

I've run campaigns before, and I know this is the stuff that wins elections. **[So I'm asking you to help us _do more_ by rushing a mid-month donation.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d8f/4082994173/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161013nd&amount=25") Your gift will go right back out the door to allow our field, communications, research, and Get Out The Vote teams to do more to win this race.** [](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d8f/4082994173/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161013nd&amount=25") It's pretty simple how this works. If you **[give $10](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d8e/4082994173/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161013nd&amount=10")** , we can pay for a batch of campaign literature for on-the-fence voters. If you **[give $25](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d8f/4082994173/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161013nd&amount=25")** , we can buy snacks for a phone banking session, allowing our amazing volunteers to make more calls. **[A $35 donation](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d8d/4082994173/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161013nd&amount=35")** pays for a tank of gas to get our canvassers around the state. And so on.

These are real numbers -- and we can't make them add up to a win without your help. **[So I hope you'll dig deep and help us leave everything on the field](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5054e/7be36b49/1e507b25/78f80d8f/4082994173/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161013nd&amount=25")** as we work to elect Evan and build a bright future for Indiana.

Thank you,

Paul Tencher

name: Jay Inslee
subject: What we must do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Get Out the Vote! [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTY3OTkyOQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMDk2NjQ5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, **At the end of every campaign, it always comes down to one thing: our Get Out the Vote efforts.** That's why, with ballots dropping around Washington in a few days, our campaign is making a concerted effort to ensure voters complete and return their ballots. It's our top priority. **In such a volatile election year, we must turn out Democrats to support our candidates up and down the ballot. No race should be considered "in the bag."** We're certainly not doing that with the governor's race. The team and I are working around the clock to strengthen and expand our grassroots support. subject: The EMILY's List family:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09a7/24c69fd9/1037ee14/18eb02ce/1794402323/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all&source=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Five years ago I sat down with Elizabeth Warren to try to convince her to throw her hat in the ring for the Massachusetts Senate race.

Her questions were similar to what so many women ask me when they consider running: "How will I raise the money?" "What happens when opponents attack me or my family?" "How tough do I need to be to take this on?"

I answered every question honestly. And I told Elizabeth the same thing EMILY's List told Barbara Mikulski, Mazie Hirono, Hillary Clinton, Gwen Moore, and countless other women -- that we would be there for her every step of the way, no matter how hard it got.

**[Right now, our candidates are entering the final stretch of their races. Donate $3 today to give them the extra support they need in these critical, final weeks.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09a7/24c69fd9/1037ee14/18eb02cf/1794402323/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161013_email_WhenAsked?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Right+now+our+candidates+are+entering+th&utm_campaign=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all&source=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all")**

Our endorsement is more than a pat on the back and a stamp of approval -- when we bring candidates into the EMILY's List family, it means a lot.

And that's why this community is so important. You go the extra mile for candidates like Elizabeth and Barbara and Hillary and the hundreds of other women running up and down the ballot.

Part of being in the EMILY's List family means going to bat for our sisters.

When a local Republican leader wrote homophobic things about our Minnesota House candidate Angie Craig and her family this fall, we had her back. When Joe Heck's former aide questioned Catherine Cortez Masto's Mexican heritage in the Nevada Senate race, we called him out. And when Donald Trump said that Hillary didn't have the right look to be president, you better believe we were THERE.

I hear from candidates every week about how much EMILY's List's support means to them. We can't let a single one of them down -- the stakes are simply too high.

As Elizabeth Warren said, when campaigns get tough and punches are thrown, "How do you fight back? You fight back with EMILY's List."

**Donate $3 today to help our candidates fight back and win in November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-Back-with-EMILYs-List](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09a7/24c69fd9/1037ee14/18eb02c8/1794402323/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161013_email_WhenAsked?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightBackwithEMI&utm_campaign=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all&source=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09a7/24c69fd9/1037ee14/18eb02c9/1794402323/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161013_email_WhenAsked?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all&source=WPEFEV30N_digital_email_20161013_WhenAsked_n-all")

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: what's your plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, I first met Chris discussing our different musical tastes, favorite movies and yes -- debating nuclear weapons policy and the nuclear freeze movement. Little did I know that 30 years later his passion to make our communities and our world a safer and better place would still be a defining theme of our lives together.

But I should have guessed, because Chris has always been a strong believer that government can be an important force for good. Sadly, we are living in a time when the radical ideology of groups like the Tea Party are undermining faith in our democracy. For the last 6 years Republican control of the Congress has enabled these extremists to control the agenda and block efforts to make progress.

That's why Washington Republicans and their big-money friends are determined not to lose their majority. They're trying to turn the tide of this election in races across the country--and Maryland won't be an exception.

Over the past few months, top Republicans like Scott Walker and Carly Fiorina have been helping fund our Republican opponent's agenda. They -- just like the NRA and a shady SuperPAC that has already started attacking Chris -- know that our opponent will stand with them if she's elected.

Chris won't.

Chris has spent his time in public service fighting to keep dark money out of politics and end gun violence, and advancing the issues that matter most to the people of Maryland. And when he's elected to the U.S. Senate, his opponent's big-money friends know that he'll keep fighting for our values and priorities.

Early voting begins in Maryland in less than 30 days, friend. Will you chip in $ or whatever you can right now to help keep us reach our September goal before Friday's FEC deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $5 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $10 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $25 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $50 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $100 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $200 to stand with Chris >>>

Or donate another amount to stand with Chris >>>

Polls show that 19% of the electorate in Maryland is still undecided. We need to do better than that. With less than one month until early voting we must do everything we can to turn out as many voters as we possible and move our state and our country forward.

Thank you for being part of this,

Katherine

| ** _IN CASE YOU MISSED IT_**
_Letter to the Editor: Minter résumé exaggerated_
(Source: Rutland Herald, October 13th, 2016)
Marcia Guyette of Waterbury Center highlights in her letter to the _Rutland Herald_ , how important it is for the next Governor to understand the scope of the challenges working Vermonters face and have the leadership ability and experience to lead the state forward.

She also points to some of the exaggerations Phil’s opponent is making about her leadership experience:

“As I follow the gubernatorial race, I’ve found that it appears Ms. Minter is exaggerating her résumé. Ms. Minter continually references her time as secretary of transportation and her role as the Irene recovery officer, which begs the question, how long was she in each of these jobs and what did she do,” Mrs. Guyette wrote. “Ms. Minter was the secretary of transportation for less than one year (January to August 2015), which means she never balanced the agency’s $600 million budget as the secretary as she has led people to believe in debates and ads,” she continued. “...Beyond Ms. Minter’s embellished résumé, I do not feel she really understands how challenging it is for the average Vermont family to make ends meet. If she did, she would not be talking about expanding sales taxes or increasing bank fees, but rather about increasing economic opportunities like Phil Scott.”

To Read Marcia’s letter [_click here_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=18e2363ddd&e=19cebfe173) _._

**Phil Scott: Restoring Faith and Trust in Government**
To restore faith and trust in state government, it is important for the next Governor to focus on the fundamentals and always follow through. Vermonters are tired of politicians who over promise and won’t tell the full story on critical matters. We need a Governor who listens to all people, sets deliberate priorities and, above all, delivers measurable results. To read more on Phil’s plan to rebuild trust in state government, [_click here_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dd212e643c&e=19cebfe173) _._

See, these Republican Two-Steppers are afraid to get caught standing _with_ Donald Trump. But they're also afraid to stand up to him. Here's what that leads to:
* Insisting that _supporting_ Trump is different from _endorsing_ him
* Calling his latest outrage intolerable (never mind all the other outrages they happily tolerated)
* Threatening to cast protest votes for Ronald Reagan, Spongebob Squarepants, or their third-grade teacher

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, September 13, 2016
Subject: What we must do

Dear Friend,
**At the end of every campaign, it always comes down to one thing: our Get Out the Vote efforts.**
That's why, with ballots dropping around Washington in a few days, our campaign is making a concerted effort to ensure voters complete and return their ballots. It's our top priority.
**In such a volatile election year, we must turn out Democrats to support our candidates up and down the ballot. No race should be considered "in the bag."**
We're certainly not doing that with the governor's race. The team and I are working around the clock to strengthen and expand our grassroots support.
Thousands of phone calls are being made by dedicated volunteers to likely voters. We have folks going door to door, reminding their friends and neighbors to vote when ballots arrive. Personal contact is the rule, not the exception.
[**That 's why I'm asking you to help us raise $15,000 for our GOTV efforts. Will you make an immediate contribution? Our deadline is midnight on Saturday.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTY4Nzc1NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTA0ODU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

JOIN US IN GREENSBORO, NC TOMORROW!
| Dear Peter,

Remember to get your tickets to join Donald J. Trump and team in Greensboro, NC,**tomorrow**at** 2:00 PM** for a rally! [Get your tickets here.](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fgreensboro-nc1%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nc_grnsbro25&n=2 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/greensboro-nc1/") Details about the event are below:

**Friday, October 14th: Greensboro, NC
**
**** White Oak Amphitheater 1921 W. Gate City Blvd. Greensboro, NC 27403 Doors Open: 11:00 AM
Event Begins: 2:00 PM
[Get your tickets here.](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fgreensboro-nc1%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nc_grnsbro25&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/greensboro-nc1/")
__ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you there! Sincerely,

Team Trump–Pence

* * *
